name: my-plugins
description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works: planning, TDD, debugging, and collaboration workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Planning, brainstorming, plan execution, TDD, and delivery workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use my-plugins to guide agent work through brainstorming, implementation planning, test-driven development, systematic debugging, parallel execution, code review, and finish-the-branch workflows.
defaultPrompt: I've got an idea for something I'd like to build.
